violations.text: Lobster meat observed thawing in the walk-in cooler in its original packaging. ROP foods must be removed from packaging while thawing to allow oxygen to enter. Product was still in the frozen state and was removed from packaging. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2026

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2026
Refrigerator door gasket of the large prep unit was observed in poor repair, splitting away from the door. Gasket is to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026
Allergen statement was lacking on the menu. Per PIC, and allergen statement will be added next time they print menus. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023
The handle on the one door cooler located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2023
